name.value: - The Organelle M and the Organelle S!

value.value: - The Organelle M and the Organelle S!

name.value: They are nearly identical from a hardware and software standpoint - they run the same patches, have the same processor & RAM, same audio & MIDI ports, same keys, knobs, and screen.

value.value: They are nearly identical from a hardware and software standpoint - they run the same patches, have the same processor & RAM, same audio & MIDI ports, same keys, knobs, and screen.

name.value: The differences: The M has a speaker and can use built-in battery power while the Organelle S lacks both a speaker and battery power option.

value.value: The differences: The M has a speaker and can use built-in battery power while the Organelle S lacks both a speaker and battery power option.
